query:
INSERT INTO scratchpad (chat_id, content, token_count)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
            ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE
            SET content     = EXCLUDED.content,
                token_count = EXCLUDED.token_count,
                updated_at  = NOW()
            RETURNING
                chat_id,
                content,
                token_count,
                updated_at as "updated_at!: jiff_sqlx::Timestamp"
